title: Release Manifest
description: Record of a single release-branch assembly event. Written by the PR-merge workflow (.github/workflows/release-assemble-on-pr-merge.yml) and consumed by `make release-assemble REF= MANIFEST=` and `make release-tag-propagate`.

release_ref.description: Release branch this manifest records (e.g. release/2026.05.0).

cut_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the assembly ran.

cut_by.description: Author identity that produced the assembly (workflow bot or human).

pinned_sha.description: Full 40-char sibling HEAD SHA at assembly time.

pinned_from_ref.description: Source branch on the sibling repo from which the SHA was taken.

local_path.description: Snapshot of the registry's local_path at assembly time.
